note.fr: Les <w id='brahma-sutras-badarayana'>Brahma Sūtra</w> de <ph id='badarayana'>Bādarāyaṇa</ph> sont le texte de base que <ph id='shankara'>Śaṅkara</ph> commente : il les transmet en les lisant de façon non duelle (son Brahma-sūtra-bhāṣya), fondant l'<mv id='vedanta'>Advaita</mv> sur cette autorité et y ancrant l'identité de l'âme et du <c id='brahman'>brahman</c>.
note.en: <ph id='badarayana'>Bādarāyaṇa</ph>'s <w id='brahma-sutras-badarayana'>Brahma Sūtras</w> are the base text that <ph id='shankara'>Śaṅkara</ph> comments on: he transmits them by reading them non-dualistically (his Brahma Sūtra Bhāṣya), grounding <mv id='vedanta'>Advaita</mv> on that authority and anchoring there the identity of the self and <c id='brahman'>brahman</c>.

sources.en: Śaṅkara, Brahma Sūtra Bhāṣya (Commentary on the Brahma Sūtras)
